title: Recovery replays a durable commit
description: All participants vote YES, the coordinator durably logs COMMIT, then crashes before everyone hears the outcome. Recovery replays the log and safely finishes phase two.

participants.name: inventory
participants.notes: reservation is prepared before the crash

participants.name: billing
participants.notes: prepared payment can commit after recovery

participants.name: shipping
participants.notes: shipment creation waits for replayed decision
